calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-12-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: WALTER PARSLEY FOR PLAINTIFF ANCHOR REALTY
DEFENDANT DAVID RAMIREZ IN PRO PER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PLACED ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MAY RETAIN POSSESSION OF 632 SAN BRUNO AVE #6 IF: 1) DEFENDANT PAYS $900 BY 1/12/05 (BY CHECK 3 TODAY); 2)DEFENDANT PAYS $900 BY 2/1/05; 3)DEFENDANT PAYS $510.84 BY 2/5/05 WHICH IS A PARTIAL INSTALLMENT OF PAST DUE RENT; 4)DEFENDANT PAYS $1410.84 ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH STARTING IN MARCH AND CONTINUING FOR APRIL, MAY AND JUNE WHICH IS $900 RENT AND $510.84 PAST DUE RENT. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH TERMS, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE BY 6/15/05.
IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY, JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED WITH 24 HOUR TELEPHONE NOTICE TO 415.710.1271. JUGMENT SHALL INCLUDE DAMAGES AND COSTS. ANY PROPERTY LEFT BECOMES THE PROPERTY OF THE PLAINTIFF. A TRANSCRIPT IS ORDERED BY THE PLAINTIFF WHO WILL PROVIDE COPY TO DEFENDANT.

JUDGE PRO TEM:TIELA CHALMERS; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; CHRISTINA PAXTON (218)
